description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets GOPATH to the current directory in a before_script and defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a go-build-1.4 job using the golang:1.4 image that runs go get gitlab.com/chriseaton/malk-storage, git submodule update --init, and go build. Also in the build stage add a go-build-1.5 job using golang:1.5 with the same three commands. Add a vet job in the build stage using golang:1.5 that executes a loop over all *.go files running go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false $f. In the test stage add go-test-1.4 and go-test-1.5 jobs using golang:1.4 and golang:1.5 respectively, each running go get github.com/stretchr/testify, go get gitlab.com/chriseaton/malk-storage, and go test.
